changes.description: Section 3 subsection A — Lead finding statement from primary_concern and top_hypothesis_line
changes.root_cause: primary_concern: string confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:180. top_hypothesis_line: string confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:183. Both fields are present on ClinicianReportV1.sections.page1 and are currently consumed by InsightPanel (InsightPanel.tsx:81 and :84). Section 3 must derive a short lead statement from these — not dump them raw. OVERLAP RISK: InsightPanel already renders primary_concern as headline (line 81) and top_hypothesis_line as next-step cue (line 84). Cursor must adapt InsightPanel or reposition it to avoid duplicate display of the same text on screen.
changes.scope_constraint: Must not repeat Section 1 (ResultsBodyOverview) wording verbatim. If InsightPanel is retained, its headline and top_hypothesis_line blocks must be stripped or InsightPanel must be repositioned/removed to avoid duplication.

changes.description: Section 3 subsection B — What this means from top_hypothesis_line and key_findings[0]
changes.root_cause: top_hypothesis_line: string confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:183. key_findings: string[] confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:181. key_findings[0] is currently rendered by InsightPanel as an interpretation paragraph (InsightPanel.tsx:83). OVERLAP RISK: InsightPanel.tsx:83 already renders key_findings[0] as interpretationParagraph. Cursor must address this overlap explicitly.
changes.scope_constraint: Do not expand beyond surfaced deterministic text. If the underlying text is thin, keep the block thin.

changes.description: Section 3 subsection C — How the evidence connects, from chains (1-2 items max)
changes.root_cause: chains: string[] confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:182. chains is NOT currently rendered in any main-view section. It is only rendered inside ClinicianReportRenderer.tsx (lines 191-196) which lives in the collapsed Advanced analysis tab. Section 3 subsection C is NET NEW surface for chains in the primary results view — no duplication risk.
changes.scope_constraint: Show only 1-2 strongest chains. If chains is empty/absent, omit cleanly — no empty subsection heading.

changes.description: Section 3 subsection D — Supports this interpretation from root_cause.hypotheses[0].evidence_for
changes.root_cause: sections.root_cause: ClinicianRootCauseFindingV1 | null confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:194. ClinicianRootCauseFindingV1.hypotheses: ClinicianHypothesisV1[] confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:156. OVERLAP RISK: RootCauseEvidenceSummary already renders evidence_for (RootCauseEvidenceSummary.tsx:39) in the main results view. Cursor must adapt RootCauseEvidenceSummary or remove it to avoid duplicating the supports block.
changes.scope_constraint: Max 3 evidence-for items. If root_cause is null, omit cleanly — do not fabricate.

changes.description: Section 3 subsection E — Pulls against or complicates from root_cause.hypotheses[0].evidence_against
changes.root_cause: ClinicianHypothesisV1.evidence_against: ClinicianEvidenceItem[] confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:145. OVERLAP RISK: RootCauseEvidenceSummary already renders evidence_against (RootCauseEvidenceSummary.tsx:40). Same resolution required as subsection D.
changes.scope_constraint: Max 2-3 items. If absent, omit cleanly.

changes.description: Section 3 subsection F — What would clarify the picture from root_cause.missing_data and sections.confirmatory_tests
changes.root_cause: ClinicianHypothesisV1.missing_data: ClinicianMissingDataItem[] confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:146. sections.confirmatory_tests: ClinicianConfirmatoryTestItem[] confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:195. ClinicianConfirmatoryTestItem fields (test_id, display_name, rationale) confirmed at frontend/app/types/analysis.ts:132-136. PipelineStatus currently uses sections.confirmatory_tests (results/page.tsx:517) for the trust strip — different rendering context, LOW duplication risk. RootCauseEvidenceSummary renders missing_data (RootCauseEvidenceSummary.tsx:41) — same overlap resolution required as subsections D/E.
changes.scope_constraint: Keep short. Only one or two clarifying items. Not the full action section.

stop_conditions_verified: Do not use ExplainabilityReportV1 — not in frontend DTO, explicitly prohibited by prompt (line 110)
Do not use arbitration_result — not in frontend DTO, prohibited (prompt line 109)
Do not add new backend DTO fields — explicitly out of scope (prompt line 58)
Do not fabricate supports/complicates when root_cause is null — prompt Case 2 and Case 3 fallback model (lines 231-244)
Do not use raw signal names, phenotype, internal IDs, or backend-only explainability artifacts (prompt lines 316-323)
Do not create new components if InsightPanel / RootCauseEvidenceSummary can be reused or adapted (prompt lines 254-263)
regression_protection: ResultsBodyOverview (Section 1) — must be unchanged; it already uses primary_concern via buildBodyOverviewPrimarySentence
PipelineStatus (trust strip) — must be unchanged; it uses data_quality and confirmatory_tests independently
InsightPanel — will be adapted/repositioned; existing rendering logic must not break
RootCauseEvidenceSummary — will be adapted/repositioned; null guard (line 37) must be preserved
navigation / loading / error states in results/page.tsx — must be unchanged
Advanced analysis section (ClinicianReportRenderer, InsightsPanel) — must remain functional and untouched
determinism_risks: NONE — sprint is purely frontend presentation. No analytics logic, ranking logic, compiler, evaluator, or pipeline touched.

OVERLAP RISK (UX integrity, not analytics): if InsightPanel and RootCauseEvidenceSummary are retained unchanged alongside Section 3, the same structured content will appear twice on screen. Cursor must resolve this by adapting/repositioning the existing components.
behavioural_surface_area: frontend/app/(app)/results/page.tsx — new Section 3 insertion between Section 2 and current InsightPanel position
frontend/app/components/results/RootCauseEvidenceSummary.tsx — likely adaptation or removal from main view
new Section 3 wrapper component if existing components cannot cleanly serve the role

arbitration_result — not in analysis.ts or any frontend type; prohibited by prompt
